message:
refactor(core): migrate native_events to runtime_compat Unix socket layer

Continue the runtime_compat Unix socket consolidation (see commit
42935ae7) by migrating NativeEventListener from direct tokio::net and
tokio::io imports to the compat_unix abstraction layer.

native_events.rs (+9, -12):
  - Replace tokio::io::{AsyncBufReadExt, BufReader} and
    tokio::net::UnixListener imports with runtime_compat::unix::{
    compat_unix, UnixListener, UnixStream}
  - NativeEventListener::new: UnixListener::bind → compat_unix::bind
    (now async)
  - handle_connection(): replace BufReader::new + reader.lines() +
    lines.next_line() with compat_unix::lines(compat_unix::buffered())
    + compat_unix::next_line()
  - Test imports: replace tokio::io::AsyncWriteExt and
    tokio::net::UnixStream with compat_unix equivalents
  - Three test functions updated: UnixStream::connect →
    compat_unix::connect

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
